# Sample videos

Short clips for trying the example app's Video File screen and for
regenerating the README demo with
`example/integration_test/hand_video_driver_test.dart`.

## origami_9s.mp4

9-second excerpt (video only, re-encoded H.264, no audio) from:

"DIY EASY ORIGAMI TUTORIAL: HOW TO MAKE A PAPER PIANO" by Maison ZiZou,
https://youtu.be/oqEMNDsDK8o, used under the Creative Commons Attribution
license (CC BY 3.0, reuse allowed), https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/.
Changes: trimmed to 9 seconds, audio removed, re-encoded.

The annotated demo gif in `assets/screenshots/` is derived from this clip
(landmark overlay added by the hand_detection example pipeline) and carries the
same attribution.
